# BP-120 negative variant: a non-Fiber context with BodyParser is ignored.
lang: go
file: BP-120-variant-safe.go
variant: non-fiber
---
package sample

type Context struct{}

func (Context) BodyParser(any) error { return nil }

func update(ctx Context) error {
	var request struct {
		Enabled bool
	}
	if err := ctx.BodyParser(&request); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return nil
}
